chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-4666 of 2016 --------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------- Priority 1.For order on CMA No.32707/2016. 2.For order on Misc. No.31455/2016. 3.For hearing of Misc. No.23192/2016. 4.For hearing of Main Case. 14.12.2016 Mr. Munawar Hussain, Advocate alongwith Petitioner No.1. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 1. Urgency granted. 2. Counsel for the petitioners has filed application for withdrawal of this petition. The application is supported by the personal affidavit of M. Arif Khan who is petitioner No.1. So far as the petitioner No.2 is concerned, the learned counsel submits that the same instruction has been given by him for withdrawal of this petition. In view of this statement, petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Asif
